Pass 2 row 4.P2.6 includes the canonical-fact that Willie Carl Singleton died in Germany in 1995. This is the kind of detail that may not appear in canonical St. Augustine archives but is preserved through speaker oral history. Worth flagging for the WWU team's separate biographical-fact verification.

Pass 2 of entry #5 captures the monument as Vickers's project. Pass 1 of entry #4 row 4.51 cross-references "Gwendolyn Duncan + Foot Soldiers monument committee." Cross-entry pattern is well-documented; no Pass-3 correction needed but worth noting as a cross-entry canonical reference.

SRT line 1599: "We didn't have nobody but each other to talk to and we had a Bible they gave us but Spiritsure we was already anointed by the Lord." Speaker's natural intonation; Whisper merged "but sure" into "Spiritsure." Alternative reading: "**Spirit-sure**" as a compound the speaker actually uses — flag for community informant.

pending_context.whisper: "Confines and went out your nail for 52 days"
pending_context.candidate_correction: *Confined, just by myself* in a cell for 52 days
pending_context.notes: SRT line 1619: Audrey Nell describing isolation at Ocala. Whisper produced nonsense; speaker's "with no [one]" + "alone in a cell" merged into "went out your nail." Cannot confidently recover exact phrasing. Flag.

pending_context.whisper: "I had no teaching to go in the jail"
pending_context.candidate_correction: I had no *intention* to go in the jail
pending_context.notes: SRT line 2243: Audrey Nell describing her reluctance to be the one chosen by King. Whisper rendered "intention" as "teaching." Alternative: "**inclination**."

pending_context.whisper: "I want my love hero to come and go with me"
pending_context.candidate_correction: I want *my little hero to come and* go with me
pending_context.notes: SRT line 2263: MLK selecting Audrey Nell. Whisper rendered "little" as "love" — speaker's recollection of King's affectionate term for her ("little hero" referring to her age and the 1963 sit-in fame).

pending_context.whisper: "we'd be like to, until to be served"
pending_context.candidate_correction: we'd *like to sit and* be served
pending_context.notes: SRT line 2339: Dr. King to Brock at the Monson Motor Lodge restaurant. Speaker's recollection mangled by Whisper; the canonical request was "we'd like to sit down and be served" or "we'd like to be served."

pending_context.whisper: "they pushed down the ponds out there on US one"
pending_context.candidate_correction: they pushed down *the Ponce de Leon* out there on US 1
pending_context.notes: SRT lines 3955-3959: Audrey Nell describing St. Augustine erasing civil-rights-era buildings. Whisper rendered "Ponce de Leon" as "ponds" — likely referring to the Ponce de Leon Motor Lodge or similar Ponce de Leon-named civil-rights-era site on US 1. Alternative reading: literal "ponds" — speaker's natural diction. Flag for adversarial review.

SRT lines 3343-3347: "They almost were champions. But they didn't get the political outcome." Audrey Nell describing her son's high-school football team; "political outcome" is semantically odd. Likely speaker's natural phrasing or Whisper artifact. Speaker-originating, low confidence. Flag.

pending_context.whisper: "we make the law hell and we break it"
pending_context.candidate_correction: we *made the law [and] we can* break it
pending_context.notes: SRT line 1227: NAACP representative Mr. Shaw quoted by Audrey Nell as defying Judge Mathis. Possible reading: "**[They] make the law, hell, we break it**" (defiance/expletive). Speaker's vehemence; flag for adversarial review of the exact phrasing.

pending_context.candidate_correction: *[All y'all] being hauled" or "[are they] being hailed*
pending_context.notes: SRT line 3551: "I was like, are I being hailed?" Audrey Nell's reaction to seeing Hayling in her own FBI file — likely meaning "are y'all being hauled [in to FBI surveillance]?" Speaker dialect + Whisper error. Flag.

pending_context.candidate_correction: He stays in *Kingsville*" — likely the FL/GA town
pending_context.notes: SRT line 3323: Audrey Nell's son's location. Cannot canonical-verify which Kingsville (Florida, Texas, etc.) without further info; preserve as speaker-originating.

SRT line 3615: After describing the cemetery, Audrey Nell mentions "Miss Hadith, why" — speaker mid-utterance with possible interruption. Possibly "Miss Edith" with surname truncated. Unrecoverable; flag.

SRT line 2483: Audrey Nell's home street near St. Paul AME Church in Lincolnville. Whisper rendered an unrecognizable name. Lincolnville's actual street grid includes Central Avenue, Cincinnati Avenue, and Washington Street; "Syntron" is closest phonetically to "Central." Flag.

pending_context.whisper: "the lady came and said, do you all want to look at a movie? Joanne, let me say, move"
pending_context.notes: SRT lines 2575-2581: Audrey Nell describing first time on a plane. "Joanne let me say, move" → "Joanne[!] let me see a movie."

pending_context.whisper: "I'll always say you probably say Joanne's a good old, you know what"
pending_context.candidate_correction: I always say *they* probably say Joanne's a good old [n-word]
pending_context.notes: SRT line 3867: Audrey Nell describing white coworkers' assumed prejudice. Speaker self-censors the slur; Whisper rendered the censored form as "you know what." Speaker-originating; preserve as-is (the self-censoring IS the speaker's choice).
SRT lines 1755-1763: Sam White's mother — "Miss Price" is the most plausible canonical spelling (Whisper "Pryce" is a known spelling variant). Speaker-originating.
